title: Execution Model v2 — Phase 3: meta-work-as-ticks and re-entrant orchestration loop
description:
ROUGH SCOPE — flesh out into ticks when Phase 2 (hbz) closes. Spec: docs/design/execution-model-v2-epic-chaining-and-learning-loop.md §3. Depends on phase 2's planning-aware tk next.

- Skill creates process steps as ticks when planning an epic: 'Final review of epic diff' and 'Close out epic: retro + plan next' (blocked appropriately).
- Fully re-entrant loop: every tk next result maps to exactly one action (implement / review / close-out / plan); resuming a dead run = re-invoking the skill.
- On (re)entry: reset stale in_progress ticks, reconcile leftover worktree branches (merge if DONE was reported, else delete).
- Base branch recorded on the epic tick at run start; merges, review diffs, and resume read it from there.
- Mostly skills/ticks/ text; small tk additions only if phase 2 left gaps.
notes:
2026-06-10 15:25 - RETRO REPORT — Phase 3 (zk7)
Learnings promoted: none new — existing learnings rules held (worktree base-merge + cwd rules applied in all prompts, zero merge incidents this phase). .tick/learnings.md unchanged at ~40 lines, under cap.
Outside-in verification: spec §3 meta-work-as-ticks VERIFIED (claude-runner.md Meta-work ticks section + loop step 3); re-entrant action map VERIFIED (Resuming a run, all 6 rows incl. action:await); stale recovery incl. in_progress-childless-epic edge VERIFIED; worktree reconciliation VERIFIED; base-branch note convention VERIFIED. SKILL.md wiring to action:plan/needs_planning VERIFIED.
Drift review: docs-only diff, clean. One improvement applied at close-out: Closing-the-epic diff line now references the base-branch convention instead of a bare placeholder.
Dogfood note: phase 4 planning (kgh) used the new convention — final-review meta-tick created at planning time, blocked by all last-wave ticks.
Proposed roadmap adjustments: none. kgh is the final epic; its close-out is the roadmap hard stop.
closed_reason: All 4 ticks completed via Claude orchestration (3 waves). Retro report in epic notes.
